title: malty flaky canadian beef flank steak burger
description: Showcasing Canadian beef flank steak, this paleo-friendly burger features malty and flaky textures.
instructions: Season the beef flank steak with salt and black pepper.
In a shallow dish, mix together the all-purpose flour, coconut flour, and a pinch of salt.
Dip the beef flank steak into the flour mixture, coating it evenly.
Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the coated beef flank steak to the skillet and sear for 3-4 minutes per side, or until browned and cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the cooked beef to a plate and set aside to rest.
In the same skillet, add the granny smith applesauce and stir to combine with the remaining coconut oil and flour coating.
Return the beef flank steak to the skillet and top with the malty applesauce mixture.
Form the malty mixture into a patty shape and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes per side.
Serve the finished burger on a bed of chopped fresh parsley and enjoy!
